job_title: Machine Learning Scientist, Scientific Reasoning Models, AI for Drug Discovery
job_nlp_title: Machine Learning Scientist, Scientific Reasoning Models, AI for Drug Discovery
taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Machine Learning, Machine Learning Engineer
core_skills: Machine Learning, Large Language Models, Model Alignment, Post-training Techniques, Scientific Reasoning
skill_match_scores: Machine Learning:1.0, Large Language Models:1.0, Model Alignment:1.0, Post-training Techniques:0.0, Scientific Reasoning:0.0
must_have_quals: BS/MS in Computer Science, Statistics, Mathematics, Physics, or a related quantitative field with 2+ years of relevant work experience, Ph. D. with 0-2 years relevant work experience, Experience developing and training large-scale machine learning models, including post-training techniques to enhance domain knowledge, reasoning capabilities, and model alignment, A strong history of research excellence at top-tier venues (e.g., NeurIPS, ICLR, ICML), Strong software engineering skills and experience working with high-performance computing systems
preferred_quals: Experience with molecular modalities (e.g., protein sequences, chemical graphs, and structured molecular data), A public portfolio of research or significant contributions to open-source ML libraries, A passion for applying frontier AI to drug discovery
core_responsibilities: Design, implement, and improve large-scale distributed machine learning systems, writing robust, performance-critical code and contributing to core infrastructure, Develop and execute strategies to systematically improve performance on scientific tasks, including long-horizon task completion and complex reasoning challenges, Translate biological and chemical domain knowledge into concrete machine learning objectives, training signals, and evaluation criteria, Design and implement evaluation methodologies to assess model capabilities relevant to biological research, working with domain experts to establish benchmarks and curate high-quality data, Collaborate closely with researchers to translate ideas and prototypes into scalable, production-ready systems, Focus on the execution of defined projects, Responsible for writing clean, efficient code to test specific hypotheses regarding reasoning and alignment, Contribute to the maintenance of the training infrastructure and data pipelines, ensuring experiments run reliably on our clusters, Work closely with senior scientists to implement novel algorithms, translating research papers into working prototypes
job_summary: Genentech is a leading biotechnology company focused on advancing science and ensuring healthcare access. They are seeking a Machine Learning Scientist to contribute to the development of large-scale machine learning systems for drug discovery, specifically in the area of scientific reasoning models and biomolecular design.
